text: Key growth drivers center on Data Center platforms for AI, HPC, and accelerated computing within the Compute & Networking segment [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The company's products target high-growth markets including AI infrastructure, autonomous driving development, and robotics through its Jetson embedded platforms [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. Analyst coverage indicates strong institutional interest, with Goldman Sachs maintaining a Buy rating and Morgan Stanley reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock [51b24d4c-69bf-4f23-96d2-d68414bb5e0d, 84885452-1a5e-4e2e-9afd-33540bbee965]. The company reported Q4 earnings on February 25, 2026, though specific revenue figures are not provided in the available evidence [09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c].
